<!-- Generated by deep-scan skill. Re-run deep-scan to update. -->

# Conventions

## File Naming
- **kebab-case** for all file names: `security-auditor.agent.md`, `code-health.agent.md`, `sprint-lifecycle`
- Agent files: `<role>.agent.md`
- Skill files: `<skill-name>/SKILL.md` (uppercase SKILL)
- Migration files: `<version>/migration.md`
- Sprint directories: `SPRINT-XXX-short-name/` (uppercase SPRINT prefix, zero-padded 3-digit number)

## Agent Definition Format
- YAML frontmatter with: `name`, `description`, `user-invocable`, `disable-model-invocation`, `tools`, `agents` (optional), `argument-hint` (optional)
- No `version:` field in frontmatter (removed in 0.8.0; version.json is the authority)
- Markdown body with: role title (H1), core responsibilities (numbered list), memory vs blackboard section, domain-specific sections
- Every agent includes a "Memory vs Blackboard" section directing agents to use .tstack/ for project state

## Skill Definition Format
- YAML frontmatter with: `name`, `description`, `user-invocable`, `argument-hint` (optional)
- Markdown body with procedural steps (numbered)
- User-invocable skills: `setup`, `update`
- Internal skills (loaded on demand): `deep-scan`, `sprint-lifecycle`, `worktree-management`, `blackboard-init`

## Blackboard Conventions
- `decisions.md` is **append-only** - never edit or delete entries
- `routing.md` is **active-only** - completed sprints removed, only in-progress items
- `sprint-index.md` is **read-rarely** - agents only read when looking up historical context
- State files are **agent-created** - missing state files are normal for fresh installs
- `team.local.md` **overrides** `team.md` - agents check local first, fall back to default
- Read order: `project.md` -> `decisions.md` -> `routing.md` (before ANY work)
- `routing.md`: **read-fresh-before-write** (concurrency safety)

## Sprint Conventions
- Six-phase lifecycle: INTAKE -> PLANNING -> REFINEMENT -> IMPLEMENTATION -> REVIEW -> COMPLETE
- Status values: `intake` -> `planning` -> `approved` -> `in-progress` -> `in-review` -> `complete`
- Sprint directories are **permanent** - completed sprints contain `DONE.md` marker
- Sprint archives indexed in `sprint-index.md`

## Error Handling Patterns

### CLI (packages/cli/)
- Functions return exit codes (0 = success, 1 = error) rather than throwing
- Top-level try/catch in cli.mjs catches unhandled errors, prints message, exits 1
- Specific error codes checked: `EACCES` (permission denied) with user-friendly message
- Path traversal validation on every destination path before writing
- Missing payload files produce actionable error messages ("This may indicate a corrupted package")
- Symlink detection and replacement before file copy

### Pre-flight Script (scripts/pre-flight.mjs)
- **Fail-open design**: always outputs `continue: true`, never blocks session start
- Outer try/catch returns generic warning on any unhandled error
- Graceful handling of missing files (returns null, not throw)

### Agent Error Handling
- Agents return findings to Orchestrator on failure; Orchestrator re-routes or escalates to human
- Maximum debate rounds (Architect-Developer: 2, Developer-Reviewer: 1) prevent infinite loops
- Unresolved disputes auto-escalate to human
- Destructive operations always require human approval

## Delegation Convention
- Prefix: "Run the agent as a subagent to complete this task:"
- Include: task description + relevant context + expected output + file scope
- No vague prompts, no full blackboard dumps

## Branching Strategy
- `main` (default branch)
- `tstack/SPRINT-XXX-name` for sprint worktree branches
- Worktrees under `.tstack/worktrees/`
- Merge conflicts: STOP + escalate to human

## File Classification System
- **Framework:** Shipped in distro, safe to overwrite on update
- **State:** Agent/user-generated, never overwritten
- **Hybrid:** Framework regions + state regions, region-aware updates via migrations
- **User override:** Optional user customization files, never overwritten
- **Dogfood only:** Files specific to T-Stack self-development, not distributed

## Version Management
- Single source of truth: `packages/cli/package.json` version field
- Derived files: `.tstack/.version` (plaintext), `.tstack/version.json` (manifest with hashes)
- Pre-commit hook auto-generates version.json and .version from package.json
- Two-file tracking: `.version` (what is installed) vs `.migrated` (what has been migrated to)
- Sequential migrations: `migrations/<version>/migration.md`

## Code Style (CLI JavaScript)
- ES Modules (type: "module" in package.json)
- Node.js built-in imports only (node:fs, node:path, node:url, node:module, node:crypto)
- Named exports from all modules
- Guard clauses with early returns
- Descriptive error messages with recovery suggestions
